options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: deathlink
options.description:
When you die, everyone who enabled
death link dies. Of course, the reverse
is true too.

One Hit: Leaves you with 1 health in the
rock meter, one note away from failing,
but you can recover.

Instant: Instant fail on recieving a
death link.

options.name: energylink
options.description:
Adds your score at the end of a song
to the Archipelago Energy Link!

options.name: total_songs
options.description:
The total amount of songs in the multiworld.

Note: Final song count may be lowered if there are not enough songs
in the enabled setlists.

options.name: percent_of_gems_generated
options.description: Percent of total YARG Gems generated. Based on a percentage of Total Songs.

options.name: enabled_setlists
options.description: Select the setlists you want to play/have downloaded.

options.name: excluded_songs
options.description:
Songs to exclude from the selected setlists.

Excluded songs are formatted as
"Song Name" by Artist

Example:
"Oh, Krissy Baby!" by WhyLucas
options: "A Jagged Gorgeous Winter" by The Main Drag
"Any Way You Want It" by Journey
"Chop Suey" by System of a Down
"Come Out and Play (Keep 'Em Separated)" by The Offspring
"Give It Away" by Red Hot Chili Peppers
"Go Your Own Way" by Fleetwood Mac
"Hungry Like the Wolf" by Duran Duran
"Livin' on a Prayer" by Bon Jovi
"Lump" by The Presidents of the United States of America
"Man in the Box" by Alice in Chains
"New Kid in School" by The Donnas
"Nine in the Afternoon" by Panic! At the Disco
"Ramblin' Man" by The Allman Brothers Band
"Rob the Prez-O-Dent" by That Handsome Devil
"Shoulder to the Plow" by Breaking Wheel
"Spirit in the Sky" by Norman Greenbaum
"Tangled Up in Blue" by Bob Dylan
"We Got the Beat" by The Go-Go's
"Where'd You Go?" by The Mighty Mighty Bosstones

options.name: instrument_shuffle
options.description:
Shuffle selected instruments into
the multiworld and require songs to
be completed with specific instruments!

Note: Will be automatically disabled
if less then 2 of the Shuffle (instrument)
options are selected.

Note: The Shuffle (instrument)
options will not do anything
when this option is disabled.

Disclaimer: This option is a bit unstable at the
moment. Make sure to include enough songs
and setlists to support your instrument choices,
otherwise gen will fail with an option error.

options.name: shuffle_guitar
options.description:
Shuffle the 5 fret lead guitar
into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_bass
options.description:
Shuffle the 5 fret bass guitar
into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_drums
options.description:
Shuffle the drums
into the multiworld.

options.name: shuffle_vocals
options.description:
Shuffle the microphone
into the multiworld.

options.name: goal_song_visibility
options.description:
Sets when you are able to see your goal song.

Full: You can always see your goal song
Song: You only need the song unlock to see your goal song
Gems: You only need the amount of required gems to see your goal song
Song and Gems: You need both the song unlock and the amount of gems to see your goal song

Note: This does not effect logic at all
